strengths: 15+ years of progressive fullstack experience well exceeds the 6-year requirement, spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Kubernetes across multiple production environments
Direct AI-agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure work at re:cinq aligns precisely with the 'experience with AI agent development' requirement

Strong TDD and software-craftsmanship background demonstrated across multiple roles, including organizing Refactoring Dojos, building test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and applying CI/CD and trunk-based development at RIDE Capital
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being a primary stack requirement; Node.js experience is present but framework alignment is unverified
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (Altom 2016–2018, robotic arms context) and not present in any recent role, making secondary-stack readiness uncertain
Vitest, Jest, and Playwright are absent from the resume; testing experience is evident but tied to D-language tooling and older frameworks, leaving primary stack test proficiency unconfirmed
response.justification: Bogdan brings a genuinely broad and deep engineering background with strong alignment on the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack and a rare, directly relevant combination of AI-agent infrastructure work and rigorous TDD practice; the main risk is that the two most role-specific framework requirements — Nest.js and Vitest — are absent from the resume, so a technical screen would be needed to confirm whether those gaps represent missing experience or simply gaps in documentation.
